Function.Inference: Introductory ostinato and pickup phrase, ending with a |: loop sign.
The main looped body of the track, enclosed by the repeat signs.

Section.Inference: Introductory rhythmic pattern establishing the groove and leading into the loop.
Primary melodic theme in Bb, featuring distinctive rhythmic syncopation.
Key changes to Db; the theme develops sequentially to build tension.
Non-thematic climax with a sustained pedal point, transitioning back to the loop.
